originalTitle: Pan American Silver (PAAS) Outpaces Stock Market Gains: What You Should Know
summary: In the closing of the recent trading day, Pan American Silver (PAAS) stood at $43.51, denoting a +1.9% move from the preceding trading day.
content:
Pan American Silver (PAAS) closed at $43.51 in the latest trading session, marking a +1.9% move from the prior day. The stock outperformed the S&P 500, which registered a daily gain of 0.38%. Meanwhile, the Dow gained 0.02%, and the Nasdaq, a tech-heavy index, added 0.9%.

The silver mining company's stock has dropped by 16.23% in the past month, falling short of the Basic Materials sector's loss of 7.88% and the S&P 500's gain of 1.27%.

The investment community will be paying close attention to the earnings performance of Pan American Silver in its upcoming release. The company is slated to reveal its earnings on August 12, 2026. The company's upcoming EPS is projected at $1.02, signifying a 137.21% increase compared to the same quarter of the previous year. Our most recent consensus estimate is calling for quarterly revenue of $1.25 billion, up 53.56% from the year-ago period.

Looking at the full year, the Zacks Consensus Estimates suggest analysts are expecting earnings of $4.31 per share and revenue of $5.04 billion. These totals would mark changes of +69.69% and +39.17%, respectively, from last year.

Investors should also note any recent changes to analyst estimates for Pan American Silver. These revisions typically reflect the latest short-term business trends, which can change frequently. As such, positive estimate revisions reflect analyst optimism about the business and profitability.

Our research suggests that these changes in estimates have a direct relationship with upcoming stock price performance. To take advantage of this, we've established the Zacks Rank, an exclusive model that considers these estimated changes and delivers an operational rating system.

The Zacks Rank system, ranging from #1 (Strong Buy) to #5 (Strong Sell), possesses a remarkable history of outdoing, externally audited, with #1 stocks returning an average annual gain of +25% since 1988. Over the last 30 days, the Zacks Consensus EPS estimate has moved 7.21% lower. Pan American Silver presently features a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold).

Investors should also note Pan American Silver's current valuation metrics, including its Forward P/E ratio of 9.9. This valuation marks no noticeable deviation compared to its industry average Forward P/E of 9.9.

One should further note that PAAS currently holds a PEG ratio of 3.71. The PEG ratio is akin to the commonly utilized P/E ratio, but this measure also incorporates the company's anticipated earnings growth rate. The Mining - Silver industry had an average PEG ratio of 3.71 as trading concluded yesterday.

The Mining - Silver industry is part of the Basic Materials sector. This industry, currently bearing a Zacks Industry Rank of 57, finds itself in the top 24% echelons of all 250+ industries.

The Zacks Industry Rank gauges the strength of our industry groups by measuring the average Zacks Rank of the individual stocks within the groups. Our research shows that the top 50% rated industries outperform the bottom half by a factor of 2 to 1.

Be sure to use Zacks.com to monitor all these stock-influencing metrics, and more, throughout the forthcoming trading sessions.

chineseTitle: 泛美白银 (PAAS) 的涨幅超过股市：您应该知道什么
chineseSummary: 在最近交易日收盘时，泛美白银 (PAAS) 报 43.51 美元，较前一交易日上涨 1.9%。
chineseContent:
泛美白银 (PAAS) 在最新交易日收于 43.51 美元，较前一日上涨 1.9%。该股表现优于标准普尔 500 指数，后者日涨幅为 0.38%。与此同时，道指上涨 0.02%，以科技股为主的纳斯达克指数上涨 0.9%。

这家银矿公司的股价在过去一个月下跌了16.​​23%，低于基础材料板块7.88%的跌幅和标准普尔500指数1.27%的涨幅。

投资界将密切关注泛美白银即将发布的盈利表现。该公司定于2026年8月12日公布财报。该公司即将公布的每股收益预计为1.02美元，较上年同期增长137.21%。我们最新的一致预测是季度收入为 12.5 亿美元，比去年同期增长 53.56%。

纵观全年，Zacks 一致估计表明分析师预计每股收益为 4.31 美元，收入为 50.4 亿美元。这些总数较去年分别增加了 +69.69% 和 +39.17%。

投资者还应注意分析师对泛美白银预估的近期变化。这些修订通常反映最新的短期业务趋势，这些趋势可能经常变化。因此，积极的估计修正反映了分析师对业务和盈利能力的乐观态度。

我们的研究表明，这些预估变化与即将到来的股价表现有直接关系。为了利用这一点，我们建立了 Zacks Rank，这是一个独特的模型，考虑了这些估计的变化并提供了一个可操作的评级系统。

Zacks Rank 系统的范围从#1（强力买入）到#5（强力卖出），拥有卓越的超越历史，经过外部审计，自 1988 年以来#1 股票的平均年涨幅为 +25%。在过去 30 天里，Zacks 共识 EPS 估计下降了 7.21%。泛美银目前的 Zacks 排名为#3（持有）。

投资者还应注意泛美白银目前的估值指标，包括其 9.9 的远期市盈率。与行业平均远期市盈率 9.9 相比，这一估值没有明显偏差。

还应该指出的是，PAAS 目前的 PEG 比率为 3.71。 PEG比率类似于常用的市盈率，但该指标还考虑了公司的预期盈利增长率。截至昨天交易结束，采矿-白银行业的平均 PEG 率为 3.71。

采矿-白银工业是基础材料行业的一部分。该行业目前的 Zacks 行业排名为 57，在所有 250 多个行业中处于前 24% 的梯队。

Zacks 行业排名通过衡量行业组内个股的平均 Zacks 排名来衡量我们行业组的实力。我们的研究表明，排名前 50% 的行业的表现比排名后一半的行业高出 2 比 1。

请务必使用 Zacks.com 在即将到来的交易时段中监控所有这些影响股票的指标以及更多指标。
